reviews.review_description:
Virtual Orator provides a very solid and immersive environment for public speaking practice. The sense of audience presence feels realistic and is especially useful for building stability under evaluation.

I use it in 1:1 coaching sessions, and it integrates very well into structured exposure training. The ability to adjust audience size and practice in different settings is particularly valuable.

A well-designed and promising tool — I’m looking forward to continuing to work with it.
